purpose: To introduce HubSpot's integrated Agentic Customer Platform, showcase its various product hubs and AI capabilities, provide social proof through customer testimonials and integrations, and drive user engagement towards getting a demo or starting for free.
importantSections: Hero Section: Main headline and call to action
Social Proof: Customer logos (eBay, Doordash, Reddit, TripAdvisor, Eventbrite)
Smart CRM & Product Hubs: Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Data, Commerce, Small Business Bundle, AEO (Beta)
Built-in AI Agents: Customer Agent, Prospecting Agent, Data Agent
Footer: Final call to action and navigation links
summary: This homepage serves as a comprehensive introduction to HubSpot's Agentic Customer Platform, emphasizing its ability to connect go-to-market teams and facilitate business growth. It details various product hubs, highlights built-in AI agents for efficiency, and reinforces trust through customer success stories and industry recognition. The primary goal is to encourage visitors to explore a demo or start using the platform for free.
